name: 进阶版模板
description: 进阶模板，包含完整的四层架构，支持详细的环境、光影、材质控制

styleTemplates.hyperrealistic-cinematic: hyperrealistic, cinematic, photorealistic, film grain, cinematic color grading
styleTemplates.chinese-ink-wash: ink wash, guofeng, xieyi, gongbi, liubai, rice paper texture
styleTemplates.cyberpunk: cyberpunk, neon noir, tech noir, neon lights, volumetric lighting, rain
styleTemplates.guoman-anime: anime, cel shading, clean linework, vibrant colors, chinese anime
styleTemplates.cg-3d: octane render, arnold, renderman, unreal engine 5, subsurface scattering

defaults.camera: 85mm lens, f/1.4, 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field
defaults.lighting: cinematic lighting, volumetric lighting, rim light, volumetric fog, god rays
defaults.rendering: octane render, arnold, renderman, 8k, 16k, subsurface scattering, ray tracing
defaults.materials: subsurface scattering, skin texture, visible pores, peach fuzz, cloth simulation
defaults.postProcessing: cinematic color grading, film grain, subtle bloom, subtle vignette

input.core_visual_traits: 身形颀长、宽肩窄腰、墨黑长发、猩红眼眸、朱砂痣
input.detailed_appearance: 身形颀长，宽肩窄腰，四肢修长，瓜子脸，猩红眼眸，朱砂痣
input.clothing_details: 玄色龙袍，玉冠束发，腰系龙纹玉佩，羊角匕随身
input.accessories: 玉冠束发，龙纹腰带，羊角匕
input.personality_summary: 冷峻阴鸷，嗜血疯狂，对万公公信赖，后宫嫔妃皆惧他
input.distinctive_features: 猩红眼眸、朱砂痣、墨黑长发、羊角匕

example.output: 独孤琰，主角，男性，18岁，身形颀长、宽肩窄腰、墨黑长发、猩红眼眸、朱砂痣，着玄色龙袍、玉冠束发、羊角匕 | hyperrealistic, cinematic, photorealistic, 8k, 16k, skin texture, subsurface scattering | 85mm lens, f/1.4, cinematic lighting, volumetric lighting, rim light, octane render, 8k, 16k, subsurface scattering | --ar 3:4 --v 6.1 --s 250 --style raw --cw 100 --cref {ref_url}
